zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill於1530年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特朋迪斯福德時，她的父親John Trowbridge20歲，母親Catherine Prouse18歲。她於1544年與Sir William Hill在英國英格蘭多瑟特萊 雷吉結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1591年8月在英國薩默塞特龐迪斯福德 帕克享年61歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill于1530年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特朋迪斯福德时，她的父亲John Trowbridge20岁，母亲Catherine Prouse18岁。她于1544年与Sir William Hill在英国英格兰多瑟特萊 雷吉结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1591年8月在英国薩默塞特龐迪斯福德 帕克享年61岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特比特明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Trowbridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Dorset, Wiltshire and Hampshire): habitational name from Trowbridge in Wiltshire, named from Old English trēow ‘tree’ + brycg ‘bridge’; the name probably referred to a felled trunk serving as a rough-and-ready bridge.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill was born in 1530, in Pondisford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Trowbridge, was 20 and her mother, Catherine Prouse, was 18. She married Sir William Hill in 1544, in Lyme Regis, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in August 1591, in Poundisford Park, Somerset, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Pitminster, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill est née en 1530, à Pondisford, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Trowbridge, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Catherine Prouse, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Hill en 1544, à Lyme Regis, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en août 1591, à Poundisford Park, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill 1530 in Pondisford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Trowbridge 20 und ihre Mutter Catherine Prouse 18. Sie hat 1544 in Lyme Regis, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Sir William Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im August 1591 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Poundisford Park, Somerset, England und wurde in Pitminster, Somerset, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hillが1530年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトポンディスフォードで生まれた時，父John Trowbridgeは20歳，母Catherine Prouseは18歳であった。1544年にイギリスイギリスドールセトリメ レジスでSir William Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1591年8月にイギリスソメルセトポウンディスフォード パークで61歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトピトミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill(이)가 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 폰디스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Trowbridge(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Prouse(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1544년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 림 레지스에서 Sir William Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1591년 8월 영국 서머세트 파우디스퍼드 박에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir William Hill em 1544, em Lyme Regis, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Trowbridge Hill родилась в 1530 г. в местности пондисфорд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Trowbridge было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Prouse, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Hill в 1544 г. в местности лим регис, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла август 1591 г. в местности поундисфорд парк, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия.
